source.section: 2 - Air-to-Ground Weapons > 2.9 - AGM-88C HARM Anti-Radiation Missile > 2.9.2 - AGM-88C HARM (SP)

steps.action: Set the TAC EW (Early Warning) page on the right DDI and the SMS (Stores Management System) page on the left DDI.
In SMS (Stores Management System) page, click on the OSB next to HARM to select it
Consult the HUD, RWR or EW page ands select which emitter you want to track by pressing the RAID / FLIR Button (“I” binding). There is no range information available.
